query:
-- Emails sent to Alastair (prospect ID 90018)
SELECT emailKey, subject, sentAt, stage FROM recruitment_emails_sent WHERE prospectId = 90018 ORDER BY sentAt DESC;

rows.subject: Don't Forget — Your JLT Group Application
Your JLT Group Application — Join Before the Price Increase
